I did not know that it was fake, so I made online deposit.

It showed up as available balance at the time, so I didn't realize it was fake, and wired money of the exact same balance ( +wire transfer fee applied ) of {$7200.00} to : XXXX XXXX Account Number : XXXX Routing Number : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Account Type : Checking Bank Name : JPMorgan Chase Bank Bank Address : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX NY XXXX XXXX
So I proceeded deposit with XXXX. XXXX was taking longer time to process check deposit, so I did not make another wire transaction this time.
Then it was the next day, that I've checked my Chase checking account and my balance was overdraft, due to the check refund because it was fake after I just made wire transfer.
I called Chase, and they notified me that the bank that the check was issued had a fraudulent activity, so it was refunded.
Then I came home and realized I was scammed, and called Chase to make a fraud report.
So they've opened a case claim on the wire transfer.

I called Chase, they told me they're closing my account, even before the case investigation wasn't through, and I was the victim, and I've been using Chase for my every deposit and every income for 10 years, just over one night, overdraft due to a fraud.
